{{CargoRelic
|name=collection@20648_1
|class_id=20648
|rank=Green
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=collection@20648_2
|fame=13
|art=26
|fth=19
|civ=17
|tech=15
|ss1=prop@62418_2<br>Per 6 kinds of Souls offered, Snail HP +10<br>Souls offered: 300/300 types
|ss2=prop@62418_2<br>Per 6 kinds of Souls offered, Snail HP +20<br>Souls offered: 300/300 types
|ss3=prop@62418_2<br>Per 6 kinds of Souls offered, Snail HP +30<br>Souls offered: 300/300 types
|ss4=prop@62418_2<br>Per 6 kinds of Souls offered, Snail HP +30<br>Souls offered: 300/300 types
|ss7=prop@62418_2<br>Per 6 kinds of Souls offered, Snail HP +30<br>Souls offered: 300/300 types<br> (Awakened)
}}
